[02:01] 产生的目标语言是低级程序设计语言 比如说是汇编语言或者是机器语言

[02:42] 而这个机器语言程序就可以在计算机上直接运行

[02:48] 从而得到程序的结果 根据不同的用途和侧重

[03:05] 这样的编译程序我们称为诊断编译程序

[03:11] 这类编译程序主要在发现程序中的错误

[03:18] 帮助程序员调试排错等方面具有优势 可能对于目标代码的效率未必特别关注

[03:25] 而优化编译程序则侧重于提高目标代码的执行效率

[03:33] 它的优势在于能够生成高效的目标代码 现在很多编译程序同时提供了调试优化等多种功能

[04:25] 那么这样的编译程序就叫做交叉编译程序

[04:32] 还有一类特殊的编译程序 这类编译程序不需要重写编译程序中与机器无关的部分

default:summary:aef44c46ce537daacb60bfd1.return:
The Compilation Principles Course is a university-level specialized theoretical educational course centered on compiler-related knowledge. Its core curriculum introduces the basic principles and core, fundamental implementation technologies and techniques for constructing programming language compilers, alongside additional key topics including the formal definition of compilers, the significance of learning compilation principles, compiler design, compiler operation principles, end-to-end compilation processes, and different compiler classifications. It is designed to systematically teach learners targeted professional knowledge about compilation programs and compilation theory.

As a formal open e-learning MOOC, the Compilation Principles Course is developed and delivered by an instructor from the National University of Defense Technology, and hosted on the China University MOOC platform. All of its learning content is released in the form of pre-recorded formal lecture videos paired with corresponding supporting lecture slides, which serve as the source material for any related analyzed lecture slides and course video clips derived from the course. One of its publicly documented lesson segments is the 1.1.1 What is a Compiler chapter, for which a captured video frame has been logged at the 06:11 timestamp of that specific lecture recording.
